程序包 edu.bupt.ta.service

类 CvFileService.SavedCvFile

java.lang.Object
edu.bupt.ta.service.CvFileService.SavedCvFile
封闭类:
CvFileService
public static class CvFileService.SavedCvFile extends Object
Holds metadata about a successfully saved CV file.

  • 构造器概要

  • 构造器详细资料

    • SavedCvFile

      public SavedCvFile(String storedName, String originalName, String contentType, long sizeBytes, Path path)
      Constructs a SavedCvFile with all metadata fields.
      参数:
      storedName - the filename stored on disk (e.g. "U001.pdf")
      originalName - the original submitted filename
      contentType - the MIME type
      sizeBytes - the file size in bytes
      path - the absolute path to the file on disk

  • 方法详细资料

    • getStoredName

      public String getStoredName()
      返回:
      the stored filename

    • getOriginalName

      public String getOriginalName()
      返回:
      the original submitted filename

    • getContentType

      public String getContentType()
      返回:
      the MIME content type

    • getSizeBytes

      public long getSizeBytes()
      返回:
      the file size in bytes

    • getPath

      public Path getPath()
      返回:
      the absolute path to the file on disk
